meaning: n.[天](在地球仪上表示全年太阳的赤纬和时差的)地球仪8字曲线
examples: On Mars, meanwhile, the analemma would look more like a teardrop.
This analemma photo-composite shows the sun's path as it appeared over Girona, Spain, from March 2003 to March 2004.
Although analemmas traditionally depict the path of the sun, it's also possible to make an analemma of the moon (picture).
